name: Create App component
description: Set up functional React component with useState for tasks array and input state. Map over tasks to render list items.

name: Style with glassmorphism
description: Write CSS for glass-like containers, blur backgrounds, soft shadows, and smooth hover/active transitions.

name: Implement task logic
description: Add functions for adding a new task, toggling completion, deleting a task, and clearing completed tasks.

name: Polish UI interactions
description: Add checkmark animation, input focus glow, button hover effects, and responsive adjustments.
